text.title: chunking-document-structure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for chunking-document-structure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running MarkdownChunker without a min_chunk_size guard on documentation heavy with one-line code blocks or list items.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: MarkdownChunker can produce very small chunks (single-line code blocks, list items) that embed poorly. min_chunk_size guard is essential — empty code blocks and single-word paragraphs produce near-zero vectors that pollute nearest-neighbor results.

failure-mode.description: Using HTMLChunker on flat HTML pages (marketing landing pages, email templates) that have no semantic sectioning elements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: HTMLChunker targets section/article/div; flat HTML pages with no sectioning elements produce one giant chunk. Pre-check structure with soup.find('section') or soup.find('article') before choosing this chunker.
